title: Solace Supply
lede: Sign in with the Supabase Auth user whose email matches a seeded admin user.
missingSupabase: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in .env.local before using real login.

errors.missingSupabase: Supabase Auth is not configured. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to .env.local.
errors.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect, or the Supabase Auth user has not been confirmed.
errors.generic: Sign in failed. Check the Supabase Auth user, password, and email confirmation status.
